channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Peace Deal Is Near - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Peace Deal Is Near  The New York Times
  2. Exclusive: What's inside the Iran deal Trump is close to signing  Axios
  3. US, Iran inch closer to deal to end the war: What to know  Al Jazeera
  4. Trump says Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated,' will be announced soon  CNBC
  5. Trump says Iran ceasefire deal in final stages, to be ‘announced shortly’  The Washington Post

item.description:

item.title: Bodies of divers who died in Maldives scuba accident returned to Italy - CBS News
item.description:
1. Bodies of divers who died in Maldives scuba accident returned to Italy  CBS News

  3. After 6 Dead in a Maldives Scuba Tragedy, the Safety Lessons We Need to Take Away  Outside Magazine
  4. Shock Reason Behind Deaths of 5 Tourists in Ill-Fated Dive Emerges  The Daily Beast
  5. ‘If something goes wrong, you can’t simply surface’: Maldives tragedy shines light on dangers of cave diving  The Guardian

item.title: What will Trump do next with Iran? - NPR
item.description:
1. What will Trump do next with Iran?  NPR

  4. An ever-expanding catastrophe over Iran is not inevitable. Trump can and must be stopped | Simon Tisdall  The Guardian
  5. Three months in, is Trump losing the Iran war?  Reuters
